info.description: OpenAPI projection of the core pillar's REST contract. Authored as a ts-rest contract (src/contract/rest.ts); consumed directly by polyglot clients and via openapi-typescript by TS consumers. Covers the domains migrated from tRPC so far and grows as each slice converts.
info.title: @pops/core

get.summary: List fired alerts with optional filters and pagination
List AI alert rules

post.summary: Idempotently seed the default AI alert rules

get.summary: Get a single AI alert rule

patch.summary: Enable or disable an AI alert rule

post.summary: Run the AI alert evaluation cycle now

get.summary: List configured AI budgets

post.summary: Create or update an AI budget (keyed by id)

get.summary: List AI budgets with live month-to-date usage and projected exhaustion
Get AI observability history grouped by date
Get AI latency percentiles (p50/p75/p95/p99/avg) and the slowest queries
Get per-model AI quality metrics (cache/error/timeout/budget-block rates)
Get AI observability stats (totals + per-provider/model/domain/operation breakdowns)
List AI providers with their configured model pricing

post.summary: Create or update an AI provider and its model pricing (keyed by id)

get.summary: Get a single AI provider with its models (null if unknown)

post.summary: Run a live health check against an AI provider and persist the result

get.summary: Get AI cache statistics (entry count, on-disk size)

post.summary: Remove AI cache entries older than maxAgeDays

get.summary: Get AI usage history grouped by UTC date over an optional inclusive range
Get overall AI usage statistics (cost, calls, cache hit rate, 30-day roll-up)
List entities with optional search / type filters and pagination
Get a single entity

post.summary: Search the core pillar's domains (entities) for the unified search engine

get.summary: List service accounts (admin only)

post.summary: Mint a service account and return its one-time plaintext key (admin only)
Revoke a service account by id (admin only)
Batch-read settings by key (missing keys omitted)
Transactional batch write (all-or-nothing); returns the written mirror

delete.summary: Delete a single setting (404 on miss)

get.summary: Read a single setting (null on miss)

post.summary: Write-once upsert-and-return for a single setting

get.summary: Read the boot-time install manifest (installed apps + overlays)
Resolve a user URI (pops://core/user/<email>) for cross-pillar reconciliation
